56962.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
56962.description: Erin Burnett stays ahead of the headlines, delivering a show that's in-depth and informative.

56963.title: Anderson Cooper 360
56963.description: Anderson Cooper goes beyond the headlines to tell stories from many points of view, so you can make up your own mind about the news.

56964.title: CNN Special Report
56964.description: Bill Weir takes viewers to high tech farms, food labs, and chef's tables across America to find out how farmers, chefs, and fishermen have adapted in the modern world. Are these changes enough to save the planet? What is the future of food?

56965.title: Don Lemon Tonight
56965.description: Don Lemon brings you the biggest stories, newsmakers and spirited conversations of the day.

56966.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
56966.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

56967.title: Marketplace Africa
56967.description: Nigerian companies bring healthcare systems online in an effort to improve health outcomes across the region; the CEO of Bakhresa Group talk about the company's history.

56968.title: Inside Africa
56968.description: The powerful voices of the Cape Town Opera Company tell universal stories. Follow along as they build a new audience and educate the next generation about this classic art form.

56969.title: Living Golf
56969.description: We preview the Olympic golf competition with a look at the history of golf in the Olympic Games. Plus, learn about Japan's unique golfing culture.

56970.title: Quest's World of Wonder
56970.description: Perched on the rocky cliffs above a shimmering sea are medieval ramparts, nearly perfectly intact, protecting a gem inside. Explore the real heart and soul of Dubrovnik.

56971.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
56971.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

56972.title: Marketplace Africa
56972.description: A look at the contemporary African art market; given the wide range of applications, satellites are part of the solution when it comes to solving the connectivity gap in Africa.

56973.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
56973.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

56974.title: African Voices Changemakers
56974.description: Uplifting young girls in Ghana by teaching them to code and become leaders, and in Sierra Leone, efforts to develop early childhood education and mental health access.

56975.title: CNN Newsroom with Robyn Curnow
56975.description: Live from Atlanta, Robyn Curnow brings context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

56976.title: Marketplace Asia
56976.description: While spectators will be barred from attending the Tokyo Olympic Games, billions across the world will be using technology to tune in. The Olympic Games are a space for innovation.

56977.title: Marketplace Europe
56977.description: Anna Stewart looks at companies developing boundary breaking technologies at the Goodwood Festival's Future Lab and speaks to Jean-Marc Nasr, head of Space Systems for Airbus.

56978.description: The powerful voices of the Cape Town Opera Company tell universal stories. Follow along as they build a new audience and educate the next generation about this classic art form.
